S.FORM: = Ali Bongo Ondimba = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 2 jiyax 9 ka Ali Bongo Ondimba ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Gabon ta sayang o kiya ka Ali Bongo Ondimba, pnaah hngkawas 2009 idas 10 jiyax 16 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnataas
S.PHON: = ali boŋo ondimba = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka ali boŋo ondimba ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan gabon ta sajaŋ o kija ka ali boŋo ondimba, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnataas
S.FORM: = Ali Bongo Ondimba = Mntucing hngkawas 1959 idas 2 jiyax 9 ka Ali Bongo Ondimba ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Gabon ta sayang o kiya ka Ali Bongo Ondimba, pnaah hngkawas 2009 idas 10 jiyax 16 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan. Pnyahan pnataas
S.PHON: = ali boŋo ondimba = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax * ka ali boŋo ondimba ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan gabon ta sajaŋ o kija ka ali boŋo ondimba, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan. pnjaħan pnataas
